description: Experience a new level of service with this engaging email template, designed to entice users to upgrade their subscription plans. Ideal for software and technology businesses, this template uses compelling illustrations to highlight the benefits of higher-tier plans. It's a powerful tool for upselling, with a welcoming tone that encourages users to explore the potential of your app or SaaS platform. The design is optimized for computer and internet browsing, ensuring a seamless user experience. Use this template to boost user engagement, foster customer loyalty, and increase your subscription revenue. Whether you're in the realm of marketing, design, or technology, this undraw-styled template is a game-changer in user experience and revenue growth.
short_description: Upgrade your user experience with this engaging email template, ideal for upselling in the software and technology sector. Boost engagement and revenue with its compelling illustrations and seamless design, optimized for computer and internet browsing. Explore the potential of your app or SaaS platform today.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
